name: io.github.miketigerblue/proton-bridge-mcp
description: Hardened local MCP server exposing Proton Mail Bridge to Claude over loopback IMAP/SMTP. macOS Keychain credentials, TLS pinning, hash-pinned dependencies.

environment_variables.name: PROTON_BRIDGE_TLS_POLICY
environment_variables.description: best_effort | pinned. Set to 'pinned' to refuse to start without a verified Bridge certificate.

environment_variables.name: PROTON_BRIDGE_CERT_PATH
environment_variables.description: Path to the Bridge TLS cert (captured by bootstrap.py at ~/.config/proton-bridge-mcp/cert.pem).

environment_variables.name: PROTON_BRIDGE_PASS
environment_variables.description: Bridge app-password fallback for headless / CI use. Prefer macOS Keychain (set automatically by bootstrap.py).
